name: Salmon Fettuccine
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the salmon. Set aside.
2. Melt margarine in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Remove from heat and whisk in flour. Cook, stirring constantly, for 2-3 minutes.
3. Whisk in milk and sherry; cook, stirring frequently, for 15 minutes.
4. Stir in flaked salmon and remaining ingredients except fettuccine and parsley; cook an additional 2-3 minutes until heated through.
5. Meanwhile, cook pasta according to package directions. Drain and place on serving platter.
6. Spoon sauce over pasta and sprinkle with parsley to serve.
Makes 4 appetizer servings or 2 main dish servings.
